title: oncidium variegatum subsp. leiboldii
intro: Oncidium variegatum subsp. leiboldii, commonly known as Leibold's Oncidium, is a species of orchid native to Central and South America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, derived from its alkaloids and flavonoids. The health benefits of Leibold's Oncidium include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and provide relief from certain types of pain. The plant is typically prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, and in some cases, its extracts are used in traditional medicine preparations, but more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
